description: A biological anthropologist needs an endocast (3D model of the brain cavity) from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan to estimate intracranial volume. Create a 3D surface model representing only the intracranial space (brain), using a soft-tissue segmentation mask (approximately 0 to 100 HU) and isolating it from the external scalp and soft tissue. Export the resulting surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/brain_model.stl.
